reviews.review_title: fun good game but i got banned
reviews.review_description:
so i was just playing gorilla tag and i didn’t play this game in a while so i went on and i was BANNED for 9999 hours and the reason: unspecified reason like i never play the game why did i get banned (also i don’t have discord 😭) and also i bought the early access pack so that was a waste

and i have proof that i got banned for unspecified reason

This game is rlly good if u like cinema horror pvp or find the button and zerog
Very social game and rlly good cosmetics the best cosmetic in my opinion is the galaxy top hat 
Horror is only 1 level right now later in future updates there will be levels 2

this game allows you to connect with people across the world and the community is very nice. all moderators are cool and socialize with people and make sure the game is always in order with no toxic or glitch abusing people in it. sensor is a great developer and congratulations on gaining such a good fanbase. (just a little question, how do you obtain tiktok and youtube badge because i make vids on mysterious monkeys)
Sat there for 10 minutes not getting into a server, and the game is really fun, but not being able to play in servers is bs, i love it all, add more videos to the theater
BEST GAME EVER SENSOR AMD THE DEV TEAM DOD SUCH A GOOD JOB ON THIS ITS SO W GOOD JOB SENSOR

Me and my friend played, she was a scaredy cat at horror. zero gravity, find the button, and the other stuff is pretty good. 

One thing tho, Mia edge lights in horror a lil less bright, I almost got a headache. And possibly make level 2. 

Gotta be honest, this game is a solid 8.5/10. I recommend it.
Good game over all cool maps cosmetics and the click system is cool 👍
A good game monsters can’t catch up to me as fast
I like  it because is better than big scary

THIS IS THE BEST GAME I EVER PLAYED. It's a fun game yhey u can play in horror pvp and many others it has good graphics and the staff team is all so kind.
